zh.Kittery Point, Province of Maine or Dove: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福
zh.York, York, Province of Maine, Massachus: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克
zh.Strawbery Banke, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯特拉利 班可
zh.York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mainwaring Hilton於從1646年到1647年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福時，他的父親William Hilton62歲，母親Frances White29歲。他於1670年與Mary Moulton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1671年7月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mainwaring Hilton于从1646年到1647年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福时，他的父亲William Hilton62岁，母亲Frances White29岁。他于1670年与Mary Moulton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1671年7月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克。

nameMeanings.name: Hilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

variants.name: Hulton
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilt
meanings: German: from a short form of Hildebrand or some other compound ancient Germanic name formed with hild ‘strife, battle’ as the first element. See Hild .
English (London): from the Middle English personal name Hilte, ultimately from ancient Germanic Helto, probably from halith- ‘hero’.

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

en.lifeSummary: When Mainwaring Hilton was born from 1646 to 1647, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, his father, William Hilton, was 62 and his mother, Frances White, was 29. He married Mary Moulton in 1670, in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 4 July 1671, in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mainwaring Hilton est né du 1646 au 1647, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Hilton, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Frances White, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mary Moulton en 1670, à York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 juillet 1671, à York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Er hat 1670 in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mary Moulton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Juli 1671 in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Mainwaring Hiltonがから1646年まで1647年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーで生まれた時，父William Hiltonは62歳，母Frances Whiteは29歳であった。1670年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークでMary Moultonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1671年7月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mainwaring Hilton(이)가 1646년 부터 1647년 까지 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Hilton(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Frances White(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1670년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에서 Mary Moulton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1671년 7월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mainwaring Hilton nasceu de 1646 a 1647, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Hilton, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Frances White, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Moulton em 1670, em York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de julho de 1671, em York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mainwaring Hilton родился с 1646 по 1647 в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William Hilton было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Frances White, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Moulton в 1670 г. в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 4 июля 1671 г. в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mainwaring Hilton nació desde 1646 hasta 1647, en Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, William Hilton, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Frances White, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Mary Moulton en 1670, en York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 4 de julio de 1671, en York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
